name: zfmv_script_load_actions_from_zrd
description: zFMV_Script::LoadActionsFromZrd loads FMV path/image resources and builds the action list for a named sequence.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 1821 unmasked mismatches after masking 84 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 1912 bytes and the VC object body is 288 bytes with 2 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

Reviewed drift is dominated by source structure: Binary Ninja shows a large EH-framed inline parser/action-construction body, while the current source factors action selection through BuildAction and therefore does not match strict code shape.
The native smoke builds a temporary ZRD sequence with WAIT, BLURH, and PLAYSOUND actions and checks FMV path duplication, action list construction, vtables, fields, and cleanup.
